[09:36:25.359]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:36:25.359]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:36:25.359]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:36:25.359]                     next
[09:36:25.359]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:36:25.359]                 }
[09:36:25.359]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)

[09:36:25.359]                   name <- removed[[kk]]

[09:36:25.359]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:36:25.359]                     next
[09:36:25.359]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:36:25.359]                 }
[09:36:25.359]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:36:25.359]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:36:25.359]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:36:25.359]             }
[09:36:25.359]             else {

[09:36:25.359]             }

[09:36:25.951]                   {
[09:36:25.951]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:36:25.951]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:36:25.951]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:36:25.951]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:25.951]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:25.951]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:25.951]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:25.951]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:25.951]                     }
[09:36:25.951]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:25.951]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:36:25.951]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:25.951]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:36:25.951]                     }
[09:36:25.951]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:36:25.951]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:36:25.951]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:36:25.951]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:36:25.951]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:36:25.951]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:36:25.951]                           name <- restart$name
[09:36:25.951]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:25.951]                             next
[09:36:25.951]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:25.951]                             next
[09:36:25.951]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:25.951]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:25.951]                           break
[09:36:25.951]                         }
[09:36:25.951]                       }
[09:36:25.951]                     }
[09:36:25.951]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:36:25.951]                   }
[09:36:25.951]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:36:25.951]                 })
[09:36:25.951]             }))

[09:36:26.051]                   {

[09:36:26.051]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart

[09:36:26.051]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:26.051]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:26.051]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:26.051]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:26.051]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:26.051]                     }
[09:36:26.051]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:26.051]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:36:26.051]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:26.051]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:36:26.051]                     }
[09:36:26.051]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:36:26.051]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:36:26.051]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:36:26.051]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:36:26.051]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:36:26.051]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:36:26.051]                           name <- restart$name
[09:36:26.051]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:26.051]                             next
[09:36:26.051]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:26.051]                             next
[09:36:26.051]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:26.051]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:26.051]                           break
[09:36:26.051]                         }
[09:36:26.051]                       }
[09:36:26.051]                     }
[09:36:26.051]                     invisible(muffled)

[09:36:26.233]                   saveImmediateCondition(cond, path = "/tmp/RtmpXl0lvu/.future/immediateConditions")
[09:36:26.233]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:36:26.233]                   {
[09:36:26.233]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:36:26.233]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:36:26.233]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:36:26.233]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:26.233]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:26.233]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:26.233]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:26.233]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:26.233]                     }
[09:36:26.233]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:26.233]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:36:26.233]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:26.233]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:36:26.233]                     }
[09:36:26.233]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:36:26.233]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:36:26.233]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:36:26.233]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:36:26.233]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:36:26.233]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:36:26.233]                           name <- restart$name
[09:36:26.233]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:26.233]                             next
[09:36:26.233]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:26.233]                             next
[09:36:26.233]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:26.233]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:26.233]                           break
[09:36:26.233]                         }
[09:36:26.233]                       }
[09:36:26.233]                     }

[09:36:26.324]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:36:26.324]                   {
[09:36:26.324]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:36:26.324]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:36:26.324]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:36:26.324]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:26.324]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:26.324]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:26.324]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:26.324]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:26.324]                     }
[09:36:26.324]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:26.324]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:36:26.324]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:26.324]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:36:26.324]                     }
[09:36:26.324]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:36:26.324]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:36:26.324]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:36:26.324]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:36:26.324]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:36:26.324]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:36:26.324]                           name <- restart$name
[09:36:26.324]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:26.324]                             next
[09:36:26.324]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:26.324]                             next
[09:36:26.324]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:26.324]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:26.324]                           break
[09:36:26.324]                         }
[09:36:26.324]                       }
[09:36:26.324]                     }
[09:36:26.324]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:36:26.324]                   }
[09:36:26.324]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:36:26.324]                 })
[09:36:26.324]             }))
[09:36:26.324]             future::FutureResult(value = ...future.value$value,

[09:36:26.465]                 names <- names(envs)

[09:36:26.465]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)

[09:36:26.465]                 }

[09:36:26.465]                 }

[09:36:26.465]                 }

[09:36:26.465]             }

[09:36:26.601]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:36:26.601]                   {
[09:36:26.601]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:36:26.601]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:36:26.601]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:36:26.601]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:26.601]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:26.601]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:26.601]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:26.601]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:26.601]                     }

[09:36:27.320]                             break

[09:36:27.320]                         }

[09:36:27.596]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:36:27.596]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:36:27.596]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:36:27.596]                     next
[09:36:27.596]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:36:27.596]                 }
[09:36:27.596]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:36:27.596]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:36:27.596]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:36:27.596]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:36:27.596]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:36:27.596]                     next
[09:36:27.596]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:36:27.596]                 }
[09:36:27.596]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:36:27.596]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:36:27.596]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:36:27.596]             }
[09:36:27.596]             else {
[09:36:27.596]                 base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = base::as.list(...future.oldEnvVars))
[09:36:27.596]             }

[09:36:27.892]                               next

[09:36:27.892]                             break

[09:36:28.095]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:28.095]                     }
[09:36:28.095]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {

[09:36:28.095]                         grepl <- base::grepl

[09:36:28.095]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:28.095]                             next
[09:36:28.095]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:28.095]                             next
[09:36:28.095]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:28.095]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:28.095]                           break
[09:36:28.095]                         }

[09:36:28.095]                     }

[09:36:29.663]                   envs[common]]

[09:36:29.663]                     next

[09:36:29.663]                 }

[09:36:29.663]                     next

[09:36:29.663]                 }

[09:36:29.663]                     next

[09:36:29.663]                 }

[09:36:30.770]                     {

[09:36:30.770]                       invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart

[09:36:30.770]                       if (inherits(cond, "message")) {

[09:36:30.770]                         if (muffled) 
[09:36:30.770]                           invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:30.770]                       }

[09:36:30.770]                           for (restart in restarts) {
[09:36:30.770]                             name <- restart$name
[09:36:30.770]                             if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:30.770]                               next
[09:36:30.770]                             if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:30.770]                               next
[09:36:30.770]                             invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:30.770]                             muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:30.770]                             break
[09:36:30.770]                           }
[09:36:30.770]                         }
[09:36:30.770]                       }

[09:36:31.541]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:36:31.541]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:36:31.541]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:36:31.541]                   envs[common]]
[09:36:31.541]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:36:31.541]                 args <- list()
[09:36:31.541]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:36:31.541]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:36:31.541]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:36:31.541]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:36:31.541]                     next
[09:36:31.541]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:36:31.541]                 }
[09:36:31.541]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)

[09:36:31.541]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]

[09:36:31.541]                     next
[09:36:31.541]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:36:31.541]                 }
[09:36:31.541]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)

[09:36:31.541]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:36:31.541]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]

[09:36:31.541]                     next

[09:36:31.541]                 }

[09:36:31.541]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:36:31.541]             }

[09:36:32.565]                 envs <- base::Sys.getenv()
[09:36:32.565]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:36:32.565]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:36:32.565]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:36:32.565]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:36:32.565]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:36:32.565]                   envs[common]]

[09:36:32.565]                   name <- changed[[kk]]

[09:36:32.565]                     next
[09:36:32.565]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:36:32.565]                 }

[09:36:32.565]                     next

[09:36:32.565]                 }

[09:36:32.565]                     next

[09:36:33.024]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:36:33.024]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:36:33.024]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:36:33.024]                       if (muffled) 
[09:36:33.024]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:36:33.024]                     }
[09:36:33.024]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:36:33.024]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")

[09:36:33.024]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")

[09:36:33.024]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:36:33.024]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:36:33.024]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:36:33.024]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:36:33.024]                         for (restart in restarts) {

[09:36:33.024]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:36:33.024]                             next
[09:36:33.024]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:36:33.024]                             next
[09:36:33.024]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:36:33.024]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:36:33.024]                           break
[09:36:33.024]                         }
[09:36:33.024]                       }
[09:36:33.024]                     }
[09:36:33.024]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:36:33.024]                   }
